content.query:
create view v_AP_Aging_New
--drop view v_AP_Aging_New
as

--SELECT * FROM M3.FPLEDG WHERE SINO = '9302022'
-- reco = 9, AND REDE = PAID DATE

SELECT      A.Amount, B.*
FROM
(
SELECT      SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           SUM(CUAM*ARAT) as Amount
FROM        M3.FPLEDG
WHERE         RECO <> '9'
GROUP BY    SUNO, SINO
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      DISTINCT CASE WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            WHEN CM.CFI3 in ('CMP', 'CNR') then 'Consumer'
            else 'Pending' end as Division
,           CASE WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CMP' then 'Compact'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'CNT' then 'Countertop'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'COM' then 'Commercial' 
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'INT' then 'International'
            WHEN CM.CFI4 = 'SHS' then 'Shared Services'
            else 'Pending' end as [Business Unit]
,           FP.SUNO as [Supplier Number]
,           CM.SUNM as [Supplier Name]
,           SINO as [Invoice Number]
,           CASE WHEN FP.SUNO = '30514' AND FP.SINO = '2849' THEN '2017-12-11' ELSE IVDT END as [Invoice Date]
,           CASE WHEN FP.SUNO = '30514' AND FP.SINO = '2849' THEN '2017-12-11' ELSE DUDT END as [Due Date]
,           CS2.TX15 as [Payment Terms]
,           DATEDIFF(day, FP.IVDT, FP.DUDT) as [Terms Code]
,           CS.TX40 as [Category]
,           CASE WHEN CV.PACD = '' then 'No Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = 'A' then 'Highest Priority'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '9' then 'Stopped'
            WHEN CV.PACD = '3' then 'Priority 3'
            ELSE 'Priority '+CV.PACD END as [Priority]
,           CASE WHEN IVTP in ('PR', 'CP' ,'RC') then 'Prepaid' else 'Not Prepaid' end as [Prepaid Flag]
FROM        M3.FPLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.CIDMAS CM ON FP.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDVEN CV ON FP.SUNO = CV.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON CV.SUCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'SUCL'
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS2 ON FP.TEPY = CS2.STKY AND CS2.STCO = 'TEPY'
WHERE       FP.TRCD = '40'
AND         FP.RECO <> '9'
) B         ON A.[Invoice Number] = B.[Invoice Number] and A.[Supplier Number] = B.[Supplier Number]
